text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And that's that! After-school patrol complete!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Three Goddesses! I have some good news
for you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was on their best behavior today! My
fellow students are leading healthy, disciplined
lives!
